description.zh-Hans: 将浮点输入与阈值比较，并将两张图像之一路由到输出。根据分析结果实现分支图流程。
description.en: Compares a float input against a threshold and routes one of two images to output. Enables branching graphs based on analysis results.

triggers.zh-Hans: 条件, 判断, 分支, 如果否则, 阈值比较

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 根据图像平均亮度判断是否选择不同的输出图像实现分支。
exampleUsage.en: Branch between two output images based on the average luminance of an image analysis result.
